title: LobAttributeEnvelope
description: Envelope carried by dynamic LOB attribute-bearing lifecycle requests and responses. Product-version-specific validation is performed by LobSchemaResolver, not by this static draft-07 schema.

lobProductVersionId.description: Pinned product version used to validate the attributes object.

lobProductId.description: Resolved product id. Required on responses; omitted on create/update requests.

lobProductCode.description: Resolved product code such as cyber, _unspecified, or _legacy_cyber.

lobProductVersionStatus.description: Resolved product version status. Required on responses; omitted on create/update requests.

lobSchemaHash.description: Resolved bundle hash used for cache validation and audit.

attributes.description: LOB-specific product attributes. The static contract permits object shape; runtime validation dispatches by lobProductVersionId.
